subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Proposed action violates three critical policies: (1) POL-601 requires mandatory 48-hour staging validation before production rollout; (2) POL-602 requires change board approval and monitoring setup which are not mentioned in proposal; (3) POL-603 requires automated rollback capability and traffic monitoring configuration as prerequisites. Action cannot proceed without satisfying all three policy requirements.
applied_constraints: Staging validation required: minimum 48 hours in test environment
Change board approval mandatory before production deployment
Post-deployment monitoring setup must be configured and verified
Automated rollback mechanism must be validated and enabled
Traffic monitoring and alerting must be operational prior to rollout
